steps.title: Call 112
steps.desc: Call emergency services immediately and get an AED if available.

steps.title: Check Breathing
steps.desc: Look, listen, and feel for normal breathing.

steps.title: Chest Compressions
steps.desc: Push hard and fast in the center of the chest. 30 compressions.

steps.title: Repeat
steps.desc: Continue CPR until help arrives or patient breathes normally.
